//: component-lib preset for the devkit governance gate-engine. A flat primitives/components package (PascalCase files + cn.ts + index.ts barrel in src/). Copy to your repo ROOT. JSON has no real comments, so guidance lives in //-prefixed sibling keys — the loader ignores unknown keys. Every path resolves relative to the consumer repo, never the devkit package.
//scanRoots: Where the ratchets + scans (incl. the eslint structureRoot, via scanRoots[0]) look. Default ['src']. A monorepo lib at packages/ui/src OVERRIDES this — set scanRoots to that path; eslint.config.mjs derives SRC from it, no edits there.
//sourceExtensions: Impl-file extensions the size/fanout ratchets count. A TS component lib is ['ts','tsx'].
//boundaries: Cross-trust-boundary prefixes for the decisions smell gate. A component lib has no trust boundary, so EMPTY.
//fanoutCap: Max non-test impl files per folder (any depth) before guard-fanout trips. A flat primitives lib legitimately holds many files at src/ root — RAISE this (or add src to fanoutExempt) if your component count exceeds it.
//fanoutExempt: Flat-by-design folders exempt from the fanout cap. For a flat primitives lib, the src root IS flat by design — listed here so a 40-primitive lib doesn't trip the cap.
//decisionsDir: Append-only decision-log dir (guard-decisions CLI + smell gate target).
//structure: THE topology (data). The shared eslint.config.mjs shim compiles this via devkit's compileToEslint — no per-stack eslint rule. A flat primitives lib: PascalCase component files (.ts/.tsx) + the index.ts barrel + cn.ts helper, directly in src/; optional PascalCase subfolders nest recursively. Add helper literals (e.g. 'theme.ts') to grammar.files as your lib grows; a misnamed file (kebab, or camelCase .tsx) is rejected. Walls empty (a lib has no import boundary).
